items.title: More than 100 flood warnings across UK with more heavy downpours due
items.description: The warning covers south-west and south-east England, London and south Wales and lasts until midnight.

items.title: I'd resign if I wasn't still right for job - Howe
items.description: Eddie Howe says there is "no doubt in my mind" he is still the right manager for Newcastle despite one win in eight games.

items.title: Seahawks claim dominant Super Bowl victory over Patriots
items.description: The Seattle Seahawks deliver a dominant defensive display to beat the New England Patriots 29-13 and claim their second Super Bowl victory.

items.title: GB's Brookes & Muir target medals, plus curling semi-final - Monday's guide
items.description: What's happening and who to look out for at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Milan-Cortina.

items.title: William and Catherine say they are 'deeply concerned' in first statement on Epstein revelations
items.description: It comes after documents released in the US revealed new allegations about Epstein's ties with Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor.
